reject_unstructured: CBPR+ UG2026: fully unstructured postal addresses are rejected from 14 November 2026.
mandatory_country: CBPR+ UG2026: Country (Ctry) is mandatory for cross-border payments.
mandatory_town: CBPR+ UG2026: Town Name (TwnNm) is required for the hybrid minimum bar.
hybrid_residual: CBPR+ UG2026: hybrid addresses may retain at most two residual AdrLine.
non_iso_country: ISO 3166-1: Country must be a valid alpha-2 code.
adrline_overflow: ISO 20022: AdrLine is limited to seven lines of 70 characters.
structured_overflow: ISO 20022 PostalAddress27: structured elements have fixed maximum lengths.
